scripts.dev:all: zsh -lc 'set -m; pnpm --dir apps/api dev & API_PID=$!; pnpm --dir apps/web dev & WEB_PID=$!; pnpm --dir apps/worker dev & WORKER_PID=$!; trap "kill $API_PID $WEB_PID $WORKER_PID 2>/dev/null" EXIT INT TERM; wait'
scripts.verify:ci: pnpm typecheck && pnpm db:migrate && pnpm db:seed:ci && pnpm synthetic:run
